content: The spelling variant 'reflexion' (the older, less common English spelling of reflection) that appears in the high school vocabulary search results can act as a conceptual 'mirror' to test LLM self-reflection mechanisms. LLM self-reflection can be fine-tuned and evaluated by exposing the model to inconsistent spellings of the core concept of reflection itself, to measure how it reconciles surface-level variation with underlying semantic meaning when reflecting on its own outputs.
